creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port has net/spread4 recorded as a build dep only, but if you
	install the port on a system that doesn't have spread4, it gives
	this error:

PHP Warning:  PHP Startup: Unable to load dynamic library '/usr/local/lib/php/20090626/spread.so' - Shared object "libspread.so.2" not found, required by "spread.so" in Unknown on line 0

Fix: 

Properly record the dependency.
How-To-Repeat: 	See above.
